subcodes.first_line: O thou who art immersed in the depths of the ocean of utterance! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, He draweth thee nigh unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المنغمس فی لجه بحر البیان اسمع ندآء ربک الرحمن انه یقربک الی افق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
